title: Create Nouveau
description: A magical adventure focused modpack, featuring the create mod and ars nouveau, with a good performance and a lot of QOL mods
body:
The main goal of this modpack is to offer a simple, but fun, magical adventure for the player

Create Nouveau is focused on the Ars Nouveau and the Create mod
Having a lot of addons for the both of them

It features:

- Performance mods - Much more biomes to explore - Better combat - Create mod, to integrate with magic - Magic mods - New bosses/mobs - Rework on the ender dragon fight - QOL mods to make the game looks better - Bealtiful decorations - New dimensions - New structures and villages to explore

Still under development and it's also my first pack

**Recomended alocated RAM: 5/6gb**
